a:r.a:t: Indicative ranges derived from documented assumptions below. Actual consumption confirmed during Phase 1 discovery audit.
P1 journeys (checkout/payment): every 5 min · Standard journeys: every 15 min · Informational: every 30 min → effective avg ~12 min
20 tickets/day per brand · scales linearly with brand count · ~15–20k tokens per full triage (RCA + knowledge search + priority scoring)
GPT-4o @ ~$5 / 1M tokens blended input/output (Azure OpenAI EA rate) · actuals metered via Azure Cost Management · invoiced separately on actuals
⚑ Your actual number is determined during Phase 1 discovery.
PHTN.ai instruments your environment, measures real signal volume and token throughput, and locks in a consumption baseline before Phase 2 billing begins. No surprises.
